1.4.5.en: Added synced xComfort thermostat presets and room heating state, plus new temperature/humidity, door/window, and room status sensors with improved heater and button telemetry.

1.4.6.en: Removed room and temperature/humidity sensor device types and corrected the door/window sensor images.

1.4.7.en: Improved thermostat sensor sync and energy tracking, richer wall switch events, bridge diagnostics metadata, and better state restore after reconnect.

1.4.8.en: Fixed thermostat room sync and preset control, and corrected water sensor alarm reset syncing.

1.4.13.en: Adds thermostat heating preset Flow support, estimated thermostat power fallback, and water guard on/off control with corrected alarm sync.

1.4.14.en: Improves shading position/state sync, adds thermostat heating-demand parsing from bridge metadata, and adds extra xComfort bridge message compatibility.

1.4.17.en: removed energy reporting from devices that dont support it

1.4.21.en: Improved bridge state handling for wall switches and shading, added better direct update support, and improved metadata/home-data reliability.

1.4.22.en: Improved state syncing for actuators, shading, wall switches, and room updates, with better direct update handling from the bridge.

1.4.23.en: Fixed water sensor alarm state so Homey no longer shows a triggered alarm when the bridge reports no water alarm.

1.4.24.en: Fix WaterGuard alarm sync so opening the water valve no longer triggers a false alarm in Homey.

1.4.25.en: Fix thermostat power usage so partial xComfort updates no longer make Homey drop to 0 W while heating is still active.

1.4.26.en: Convert the remaining helper script to TypeScript and keep the update script runnable from the compiled build output.
